description: Reviewed performance baseline for the synthetic E2E pipeline. The perf gate (tests/e2e/test_real_data_pipeline.py::test_performance_benchmarks) compares against total_budget_seconds instead of an arbitrary high wall-clock cap.

synthetic_pipeline.rationale: Cold full-pipeline run over the 93-row synthetic fixture measures ~0.2s locally. The 30s budget is ~130x that headroom, so it never flakes on a loaded CI runner, yet is ~20x tighter than the old 600s cap and still fails on a catastrophic (order-of-magnitude) regression such as per-row I/O or accidental O(n^2) work. Re-measure and update measured_seconds when the fixture or pipeline changes materially; only raise total_budget_seconds with a documented reason.
